activities_projects.title: Household Work Survey
activities_projects.objective: Understand gender division of labour at home
steps: Observe daily activities of male and female members in your family
Record the time spent on household work and outside work
Compare the results and discuss the differences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises unequal distribution of work between men and women
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of observation and comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Gender Roles Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Identify stereotypes related to gender roles
steps: List activities usually assigned to men and women
Discuss whether these roles are natural or socially created
Write your opinion about equal roles in society

activities_projects.title: Women in Politics Research
activities_projects.objective: Learn about women's participation in politics
steps: Find examples of women leaders in India
Write their contributions to politics
Discuss why representation of women is important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands importance of women's political participation

activities_projects.title: Representation Chart
steps: Collect data on women representation in Lok Sabha
Create a bar graph showing percentages
Analyse the trend and write conclusions

activities_projects.title: Communalism Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of communal politics
steps: Define communalism
Write examples of communal politics
Explain why communalism is harmful for democracy

activities_projects.title: Secularism Poster
steps: Write key principles of secularism
Illustrate equality of religions
Design a poster promoting harmony
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the concept of a secular state

activities_projects.title: Religious Diversity Chart
steps: List major religions in India
Write approximate population percentages
Create a pie chart representing the data

activities_projects.title: Caste System Timeline
activities_projects.objective: Study changes in the caste system over time
steps: Write about traditional caste practices
Note reforms introduced by social reformers
Create a timeline showing major changes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands evolution of caste system in India

activities_projects.title: Leaders Against Caste Discrimination
steps: Research leaders like B.R. Ambedkar, Mahatma Gandhi, and Jyotiba Phule
Write their contributions to reducing caste inequality
Present findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises role of reformers in social equality

activities_projects.title: Debate on Caste in Politics
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of caste in elections
steps: Divide class into two groups
One group argues caste influences politics positively
The other group argues it negatively affects democracy
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops critical thinking on caste and politics
